title: 有馬記念の後に・ちがうのちがうの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition to Special Week and Grass Wonder,
many other high-profile racers participated in this
year's Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And yet, in the midst of such fierce competition...
Haru Urara comes out on top!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wowie, this is so crazy! It's like I wasn't even me anymore!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's as if someone took over my body and just
started zooming across the track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might come off as rude if I point out that she
did seem to run much better than she normally
does...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I got first, so why am I not happy?! I should be
thrilled!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Fine! I'm gonna enter the Arima Kinen again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This win does seem a bit premature... Perhaps it
would help Haru Urara really feel like she's won if
she competes again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But if she wants to do that, she'll need to prove
she has what it takes... and I know just the way to
do that!
choice_data_list: Then you gotta win some graded races!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll get good grades and run hard!
choice_data_list: N-no, that's not what that means...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Next year's Arima Kinen's first place, here I come!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this, Haru Urara's classic year training comes
to an end. Now all that's left is to believe in her
resolve.
